projects.project1.description.message: City security monitoring system based on microservice architecture, implementing video surveillance, alarm handling, and AI recognition analysis.

projects.project2.description.message: Real-time warehouse status monitoring data visualization system, including personnel scheduling, vehicle management, and task allocation.

projects.project3.description.message: Real-time monitoring and warning for fiber optic lines, supporting regional management and rapid response to abnormal situations.

projects.project4.description.message: Intelligent management platform for camp personnel, equipment and resources, providing real-time status monitoring and data statistics.

projects.project5.description.message: Warehouse management system based on RuoYi-Pro framework, integrating core business functions such as warehouse management, location management, material management, and supplier management.

projects.project6.description.message: Enterprise-level attendance management system, supporting multiple check-in methods, shift management, leave approval, and attendance statistics.
